new_addition_count_policy: Counts only JSONL proposal records in iana_service_port_diagnostic_slots_batch8_50000.jsonl. Other source/protocol seeds are extra and not included in the 50,000 threshold.
public_mode_limitation: No GitHub commit, merge, status decision, or direct write permission is granted to Dr.Debug public.
source_policy: Primary registries preferred; every generated port/protocol slot is marked PROPOSAL_ONLY_REQUIRES_PRIVATE_REVIEW and is not a claim of assignment or benign traffic.
